topics.title: 'La La Land' Poster Updated to Fix Ryan Gosling's Hand After 10 Years
topics.angle: A decade-old poster for 'La La Land' has been updated to fix Ryan Gosling's hand.

sources.headline: La La Land Poster Fixes Ryan Gosling s Flat Hand After 10 Years of the Actor Being Haunted by It
sources.summary: At long last, Ryan Gosling s wish has been granted. After speaking out in multiple interviews over the years about his dislike of his hand placement as featured on the original La La Land theatrical release poster, Lionsgate has unveiled a new design for the movie s 10th anniversary with Gosling s flat hand now sticking out. Back [ ]

topics.title: Jacob Elordi Describes Two Days Locked in a Coffin With a Snake for 'Euphoria' Death Scene
topics.angle: Jacob Elordi details his harrowing experience filming a death scene for 'Euphoria', including being locked in a coffin with a snake.

sources.headline: Jacob Elordi Spent Two Days Locked in a Coffin With a Real Snake for Euphoria Death: Sam Levinson Brought Me Back to Torture Me
sources.summary: For Jacob Elordi, the final season of Euphoria was a seemingly never-ending death chase. Until, of course, his character Nate finally died — buried alive and then bit by a rattlesnake. While on Jimmy Kimmel Live! with guest host (and fellow Euphoria star) Colman Domingo, Elordi was asked about filming the gruesome scene. When Domingo [ ]
